creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
vd          2007-02-19 09:47:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics/hugin       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    graphics/hugin/files patch-bootstrap patch-configure.ac 
                         patch-m4_ax_boost.m4 
                         patch-m4_ax_check_graphics.m4 
                         patch-m4_ax_check_panotools.m4 
                         patch-m4_fftw.m4 
                         patch-src_hugin_xrc_Makefile.am 
  Removed files:
    graphics/hugin/files patch-configure 
  Log:
  Update graphics/hugin from 0.5 to 0.6.1:
  * Change dependency on libpano12 >= 2.8.4
  * Hook dependencies on the autotools, we need to recreate the
    autogenerated files because now we have changed the autotools source
    config files (configure.ac etc.) with the hope that our changes will
    be propagated upstream
  
  PR:             ports/108266
  Submitted by:   vd
  Approved by:    cartola@openit.com.br (maintainer timeout)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.15      +19 -8     ports/graphics/hugin/Makefile
  1.5       +3 -3      ports/graphics/hugin/distinfo
  1.1       +50 -0     ports/graphics/hugin/files/patch-bootstrap (new)
  1.2       +0 -11     ports/graphics/hugin/files/patch-configure (dead)
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/graphics/hugin/files/patch-configure.ac (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/graphics/hugin/files/patch-m4_ax_boost.m4 (new)
  1.1       +74 -0     ports/graphics/hugin/files/patch-m4_ax_check_graphics.m4 (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/graphics/hugin/files/patch-m4_ax_check_panotools.m4 (new)
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/graphics/hugin/files/patch-m4_fftw.m4 (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/graphics/hugin/files/patch-src_hugin_xrc_Makefile.am (new)
  1.3       +0 -3      ports/graphics/hugin/pkg-descr
  1.5       +40 -15    ports/graphics/hugin/pkg-plist
